title: Summarise a financial statement for a non-finance audience

vars.financial_data: Revenue: $4.2M (up 18% YoY). Gross margin: 71%. Net loss: $380K (narrowed from $620K prior quarter). ARR: $16.8M. Churn: 2.1%. New logo ARR: $1.4M.

criteria: Exactly three bullets, each one sentence
